metadata.title: Platform Engineering Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, PII, and security-sensitive data assets for the Platform Engineering domain.

assets.name: Customer Profile
assets.description: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.
assets.accessScope: customer-facing journeys and approved internal operations
assets.businessMeaning: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.

assets.name: Customer Contact Point
assets.description: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.
assets.businessMeaning: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.

interfaces.name: customer-contact-point api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Customer Contact Point.

assets.name: Consent Record
assets.description: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.
assets.businessMeaning: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.
assets.businessMeaning: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.

assets.name: Session Token
assets.description: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.
assets.businessMeaning: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.

assets.name: Access Policy
assets.description: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.
assets.businessMeaning: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.

assets.name: Audit Log
assets.description: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.
assets.businessMeaning: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.

assets.name: Version Control And Code Collaboration
assets.description: Manages repositories, branching conventions, pull-request workflows, code ownership metadata, and collaboration patterns around source code.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Version Control and Code Collaboration.

interfaces.name: version-control-and-code-collaboration api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Version Control And Code Collaboration.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Policy As Code And Compliance Controls
assets.description: Encodes engineering, security, and compliance requirements into reusable checks, evidence, and exception workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Policy as Code and Compliance Controls.

interfaces.name: policy-as-code-and-compliance-controls api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Policy As Code And Compliance Controls.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Environment Provisioning And Ephemeral Environments
assets.description: Automates creation and lifecycle management of developer, test, preview, and production environments with policy-aware defaults.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Environment Provisioning and Ephemeral Environments.

interfaces.name: environment-provisioning-and-ephemeral-environments api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Environment Provisioning And Ephemeral Environments.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Infrastructure As Code Control Plane
assets.description: Provides the reusable infrastructure-as-code workflows, state handling, and policy-aware execution model used to create and evolve platform resources safely.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Infrastructure as Code Control Plane.

interfaces.name: infrastructure-as-code-control-plane api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Infrastructure As Code Control Plane.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Identity Secrets And Access Guardrails
assets.description: Provides workload identity, secret delivery, least-privilege defaults, and access-control patterns used across the platform.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Identity, Secrets and Access Guardrails.

interfaces.name: identity-secrets-and-access-guardrails api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Identity Secrets And Access Guardrails.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Security Posture And Runtime Protection
assets.description: Provides workload posture assessment, runtime protection signals, and cross-platform security visibility beyond source-level or policy-only checks.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Security Posture and Runtime Protection.

interfaces.name: security-posture-and-runtime-protection api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Security Posture And Runtime Protection.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Developer Portal And Service Catalog
assets.description: The front door to the platform, combining service catalog metadata, documentation, ownership, templates, and self-service actions.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Developer Portal and Service Catalog.

interfaces.name: developer-portal-and-service-catalog api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Developer Portal And Service Catalog.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Artifact Registry And Image Distribution
assets.description: Stores, distributes, and governs container images, packages, charts, and other deployable artifacts used across CI, CD, and runtime workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Artifact Registry and Image Distribution.

interfaces.name: artifact-registry-and-image-distribution api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Artifact Registry And Image Distribution.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only
